title: Golden Apple -> Banana
description: This resource pack replace the boring, static golden apple with an animated BANANA
body:
[BANANA ANIMATED] 12 frames of BANANA

Version:
-    The resource pack is available in 1.21.4 and 1.8.9 (tested version) versions.
-    1.9-1.21.3 = NOT TESTED
-    The resource pack will soon receive a 1.16.5 version.
